        "\n",
        "total_revenue = df_balanced['Total_Sales'].sum()\n",
        "total_profit = df_balanced['Profit'].sum()\n",
        "avg_margin = df_balanced['Profit_Margin'].mean()\n",
        "total_orders = df_balanced['Order_ID'].nunique()\n",
        "fig = go.Figure()\n",
        "kpis = [\n",
        " ('💰 Total Revenue', f'₦{total_revenue/1e6:.1f}M', '#1565C0'),\n",
        " ('📈 Total Profit', f'₦{total_profit/1e6:.1f}M', '#2E7D32'),\n",
        " ('📊 Avg Profit Margin', f'{avg_margin:.1f}%', '#E65100'),\n",
        " ('🛒 Total Orders', f'{total_orders:,}', '#6A1B9A'),\n",
        "]\n",
        "for i, (label, value, color) in enumerate(kpis):\n",
        " fig.add_trace(go.Indicator(\n",
        " mode='number',\n",
        " value=None,\n",
        " title={'text': f'<b>{label}</b><br>'\n",
        " f'<span style=\"font-size:28px;color:{color}\">{value}</span>',\n",
        " 'font': {'size': 14}},\n",
        " domain={'row': 0, 'column': i}\n",
        " ))\n",
        "fig.update_layout(\n",
        " grid={'rows': 1, 'columns': 4},\n",
        " height=160,\n",
        " title='YDTA Sales Dashboard — Key Performance Indicators',\n",

        ")\n",

        "### 3. Is there a difference in Discount given across different Payment Methods?"

        "print(\"\\nAnswer: Yes, there are differences in the discount given across different payment methods, as indicated by the varying mean, median, and other statistics for 'Discount' across different payment methods.       "source": [
        "### 4. Which Product_Category has the most outliers in Total_Sales?"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 327
        },
        "id": "14792290",
        "outputId": "67607ada-ecb9-47b4-82a5-2f3f89754139"
      },
      "source": [
        "outliers_per_category = {}\n",
        "for category in df_balanced['Product_Category'].unique():\n",
        "    category_sales = df_balanced[df_balanced['Product_Category'] == category]['Total_Sales']\n",
        "    Q1 = category_sales.quantile(0.25)\n",
        "    Q3 = category_sales.quantile(0.75)\n",
        "    IQR = Q3 - Q1\n",
        "    lower_bound = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR\n",
        "    upper_bound = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR\n",
        "    outliers = category_sales[(category_sales < lower_bound) | (category_sales > upper_bound)]\n",
        "    outliers_per_category[category] = len(outliers)\n",
        "\n",
        "outlier_series = pd.Series(outliers_per_category).sort_values(ascending=False)\n",
        "display(outlier_series)\n",
        "\n",
        "most_outliers_category = outlier_series.index[0]\n",
        "num_outliers = outlier_series.iloc[0]\n",
        "print(f\"\\nAnswer: The product category with the most outliers in Total_Sales is {most_outliers_category} with {num_outliers} outliers.\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [

              "Furniture      2\n",
              "Books          2\n",
              "Food           1\n",
              "NaN            0\n",
              "dtype: int64"
            ],
            "text/html": [

        "### 5. Create a chart showing Quarterly revenue growth year-over-year."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 572
        },
        "id": "0f221f32",
        "outputId": "ddd21991-1149-4e98-fed2-08f36c002991"
      },
      "source": [
        "quarterly_revenue = df_balanced.groupby(['Year', 'Quarter'])['Total_Sales'].sum().reset_index()\n",
        "quarterly_revenue['Revenue_Millions'] = quarterly_revenue['Total_Sales'] / 1e6\n",
        "\n",
        "fig = px.line(\n",
        "    quarterly_revenue,\n",
        "    x='Quarter',\n",
        "    y='Revenue_Millions',\n",
        "    color='Year',\n",
        "    title='Quarterly Revenue Growth Year-over-Year',\n",
        "    labels={'Revenue_Millions': 'Revenue (Millions ₦)'},\n",
        "    markers=True\n",
        ")\n",
        "fig.update_xaxes(type='category') # Treat 'Quarter' as a categorical variable\n",
        "fig.update_layout(height=500)\n",
        "fig.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nAnswer: The chart above shows the quarterly revenue growth year-over-year, allowing for visual comparison of sales performance across quarters for each year.\")"
